title: bumelia obtusifolia subsp. typica
intro: Bumelia obtusifolia subsp. typica, also known as the desert bumelia, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The desert bumelia has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various applications in herbal medicine.
